title: paste2sawa is paused
reason: Quick patch and a few small upgrades. Re-open the side panel once it unlocks — auto-checks every 30 seconds.

added.title: Keyboard shortcuts.
added.sub: Alt+Shift+A opens the side panel, Alt+Shift+X closes it. Remappable at chrome://extensions/shortcuts.

added.title: Clearer login banner.
added.sub: Now reminds you the VPN has to actually be working, not just connected.
